summary: Thumbnail PNG uploader app — single file upload (one at a time), PNG-only validation, live preview, drag-and-drop support, clean minimal UI.

existing_features.title: Build a single-page Thumbnail PNG Uploader UI that allows the user to select or drag-and-drop one PNG file at a time, shows a live preview of the selected image before upload, validates that the file is PNG-only with a clear error message for invalid types, and uploads the file to the backend on confirmation.

Apply a clean, minimal visual theme to the uploader app: light neutral background, generous whitespace, subtle rounded upload zone with dashed border, smooth drag-over highlight state, and readable sans-serif typography. Enforce the theme consistently across all UI states (idle, drag-over, preview, uploading, success, error).

new_feature_requests.summary: Build a backend actor that accepts a single PNG file upload (as binary blob), stores it with a unique ID and timestamp, and exposes query/update functions to upload, retrieve, and delete a stored thumbnail.
